title: EoE merchandizing
wikitext:
[]: EoE merchandizing.             Quote Post by toe mash » Tue Dec 22, 2009 10:44 am It just occurred to me it would be pretty hard for Gainax to produce merchandise based off of EoE. Other than unit 01/02 and MPEs figures, what else can they do? (I'm sure there are a million things they CAN and DID do. Please don't point them out and just play along :P) So I ask you, if you could buy an item that was based off something in the movie, what would you get? I think I'd like a screaming Maya figurine. P.S: You can't pick a jar of mayo.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Dec 22, 2009 11:04 am Tang

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Dec 22, 2009 11:18 am GNR body pillow

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 22, 2009 11:22 am End of the world kit, with refills.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 22, 2009 12:15 pm Seele-branded LSD. edit: NemZ wrote: ^ Beat me to it. Why hasn't the masturbation industry seized on this unique opportunity yet? One for Rei's forehead, another for Asuka's eye... maybe even Misato and Ritsuko realdolls with fuckable bullet holes. But seriously, I just want official NERV Gendo shades.

[]:             Quote Post by zilluss » Tue Dec 22, 2009 12:42 pm I would actually buy a Lillith pillow (she looks soooooo smooth) other than that LCL Softdrinks or EoE coffee or Eva-01 Shuriken

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:20 pm Those petrified MP Evas would look great in my garden.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:25 pm Model of GNR's head with a vagina on it, with Unit-01 descending within it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:30 pm Shinji and Asuka figures with kicking and strangling action, final scene outfits included. A Misato figure firing her gun, and a figure of Lilith collecting humanity's souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:30 pm Something like a dipping bird, but its Shinji strangling Asuka in the kitchen. The Egg of Lilith bowling ball. Also LCL Monkeys. Like sea monkeys but they come with red-orange water. "Watch the LCL monkeys imagine themselves in their own hearts and magically appear!" Of course children would still be dissapointed by them.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:57 pm Thongs w/ Nerv or seele logos, Evangelion Bongs(which ever Eva you perfer), and a Shinji clock w/ two alarms to choose from: Shinji screaming or Shinji screaming "I must not run away!"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 22, 2009 2:05 pm How about a statue of Eva Unit-02 with a face full of missile?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:18 pm A life size Giant Naked Rei forehead vagina.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Dec 22, 2009 4:49 pm ^ Beat me to it. Why hasn't the masturbation industry seized on this unique opportunity yet? One for Rei's forehead, another for Asuka's eye... maybe even Misato and Ritsuko realdolls with fuckable bullet holes. But seriously, I just want official NERV Gendo shades.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 22, 2009 5:02 pm how about a 12 inch Maya action figure in which her face is in a permanent freaked out look of frenzy & everytime you press the button on her, she screams & blurts out incoherent, panicked catchphrases EDIT: I meant 12 inch, not 12 feet stupid me

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Tue Dec 22, 2009 5:16 pm BrikHaus wrote: A life size Giant Naked Rei forehead vagina.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Dec 22, 2009 6:38 pm Human sized lance for home defense.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Tue Dec 22, 2009 10:11 pm Black-Hyuga plushie that says lines when you squeeze it.

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Wed Dec 23, 2009 12:42 am Life sized replica of the MP eva unit lances in sword and lance form, gendo glasses, paper weight adam embryo, Lilith wall cross lol.

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Wed Dec 23, 2009 11:09 am Geofront cross-section model.
